raw_consumer_statement:
Subject : Report of Fraudulent Credit Card Charges. 

I am a resident of the State of Maryland and am filing this report regarding several fraudulent charges made on my American Express credit card in the XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX area between XX/XX/XXXX and XX/XX/year>. I did not authorize, initiate, or participate in any of these transactions, nor was I present in XXXX XXXX XXXX during that period. 
The unauthorized charges and their associated business addresses are as follows : XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX 
( XXXX : {$1900.00} ) American Express identified additional suspicious transactions and reversed those charges. However, the XXXX listed above remain denied and unresolved by American Express, which has prompted me to have filed a police report with my local police station ( XXXX XXXX Police Department in XXXX  ) and this formal complaint. 

I am requesting documentation of this report for my records and for submission to American Express as part of their fraud investigation. I affirm that these transactions were made without my knowledge or consent.
